headline: 3 Reasons Investors Love EQT (EQT)
summary: EQT currently trades at $60.43 and has been a dream stock for shareholders. It’s returned 252% since April 2021, blowing past the S&P 500’s 60.2% gain. The company has also beaten the index over the past six months as its stock price is up 10% thanks to its solid quarterly results.

headline: Jean-Pascal Tricoire proposed as new Board member of EQT AB
summary: Jean-Pascal Tricoire is the Chairperson of Schneider Electric, one of the world's leading companies in energy and industry technologies. He served as CEO of Schneider Electric from 2006 to 2023, during which time he transformed the company from a traditional electrical equipment manufacturer into a global technology leader in energy management, automation and sustainability, growing the company to four times its size. Jean-Pascal also serves as an independent director on the board of Qualcomm.

headline: EQT Benefits From Rising Power Demand and Appalachian Basin Strength
summary: EQT rides on rising natural gas demand from AI, data centers and coal retirements, with Appalachian assets positioning it to capture long-term growth.

headline: EQT broadens investor base in Nordic Ferry Infrastructure following transformation into a leading pan-Nordic maritime transportation infrastructure platform
summary: EQT is pleased to announce that EQT Infrastructure V ("EQT") has signed an agreement to sell a 30 percent stake in Nordic Ferry Infrastructure ("NFI" or the "Company") to a consortium composed of Rederiaktiebolaget Gotland AB, publ. ("Gotlandsbolaget"), Interogo Infrastructure and Lægernes Pension (together, "the Consortium"). EQT will remain the majority owner following completion of the transaction.

headline: Will Rising LNG Demand & Middle East Conflict Benefit Venture Global?
summary: VG scales LNG exports with increasing cargoes, long-term SPAs and expanding capacity, strengthening its growth outlook and cash flow visibility.

headline: Invitation to EQT's Value Creation Day 2026
summary: For the second consecutive year, EQT is pleased to invite you to its 2026 "Value Creation Day" on 20 May in London. The event will be hosted by EQT's CEO & Managing Partner, Per Franzén, and will feature insights from EQT's investment advisory professionals, digital & AI teams, and portfolio company CEOs.
